summary: Applied surgical seam polish: rewired the opening to begin from Elsie's kitchen inventory action (instead of a wake-up frame) to diversify chapter entry construction against adjacent context, and tightened the closing image to hand off more directly into Chapter 7's hidden-tin setup.
